rulings.Case Title: SAMMIE BONNER VS. GEORGIA PACIFIC CORPORATION
rulings.Calendar Matter: Joinder In Defendant Charles G. Hardy, Inc.S Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Represented Product Identification Witness, Joe L. Pearson, To Attend Deposition
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, July 18, 2013 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Defendant C & M Building Materials Inc.¿s joinder in Charles G. Hardy, Inc.¿s motion to compel plaintiff¿s represented product identification witness Joe L. Pearson to attend deposition is off calendar. C & M Building Materials Inc. was dismissed June 13, 2013. (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: EDWARD L. LEE VS. THOMAS DEE ENGINEERING COMPANY
